actions.text: sitting at a round table, unfolding a receipt and napkin
standing outside looking at the menu
sitting and watching the street from the terrace
sitting and adjusting the strap of her tote bag
enjoying a pastry while people watching
waving to a friend approaching the cafe
moving aside to let the server pass
brushing pastry crumbs from the table
closing a small notebook after writing a few lines
checking the bill while waiting near the table
